ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., random, ordered) */,
  "avg_weights" TEXT /* Array of average weights for the experiment */,
  "avg_last_training_loss" REAL /* Average last training loss for the experiment */,
  "avg_validation_loss" REAL /* Average validation loss for the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment to track changes over time */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was completed or paused */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or notes about the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels to categorize the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the experiment type is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment type was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being run */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Number of the run */,
  "run_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run started */,
  "run_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the run */,
  "run_version" TEXT /* Version of the run to track changes over time */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Information about the hardware used for the run */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software or framework used for the run */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., training_loss, validation_loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., loss, accuracy) */,
  "collected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, percentage) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., training, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment using the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning_rate, batch_size) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., float, int) */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hyperparameter */,
  "is_tunable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the hyperparameter can be tuned */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of possible values for the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* JSON or text description of the model architecture */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file or weights */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "association_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model is the primary model for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., image, text) */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "dataset_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_datasets" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "association_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the dataset is the primary dataset for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
